Debt Securities, Available-for-Sale, Maturity, Allocated and Single Maturity Date, Rolling After Five Through Ten Years, Percentage

Allocated percentage of investment in debt security, with single maturity date and allocated without single maturity date, maturing in next rolling sixth through tenth year following latest fiscal year. Debt Securities, Available-for-Sale, Maturity, Allocated and Single Maturity Date, Rolling After One Through Five Years, Percentage
